type: DRAFT
files: outlines/types/__init__.py
region: end-of-file ordering after isbn
code: isbn = Regex(
    r"(?:ISBN(?:-1[03])?:? )?(?=[0-9X]{10}$|(?=(?:[0-9]+[- ]){3})[- 0-9X]{13}$|97[89][0-9]{10}$|(?=(?:[0-9]+[- ]){4})[- 0-9]{17}$)(?:97[89][- ]?)?[0-9]{1,5}[- ]?[0-9]+[- ]?[0-9]+[- ]?[0-9X]"
)

# Matches a US Social Security Number in the standard XXX-XX-XXXX format.
ssn = Regex(r"\d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}")

# Matches a SHA-256 hash (64 hex characters).
hash_sha256 = Regex(r"[a-fA-F0-9]{64}")
note: Proposing final ordering: isbn, then ssn (my feature), then hash_sha256 (yours) - each independent top-level var, no shared construct, just agreeing on order/placement so patches append non-conflicting hunks
